graded_findings.rationale: The spec describes a log path resolution contract that differs from the implementation behavior reported by the gather. That is a substantive design/implementation mismatch and should stop merge until corrected.

The canonical dscli command reference omitted the new logs command despite code changes adding user-visible CLI behavior. This leaves operator-facing documentation incomplete for a new operational command.

The finding identifies an untested CLI dispatch registration path, so a missing or broken dscli logs subcommand import could pass the current tests. That is a real test adherence gap for a changed user-facing command surface.
